name: scireasoner
description: One-click Codex plugin for the SciReasoner physics-problem solver. 1st place ICML 2025 SeePhys.

interface.longDescription: SciReasoner connects Codex to a three-stage multimodal physics pipeline: a structured-caption stage describes any figure in detail, a reason stage produces a step-by-step derivation grounded on both text and caption, and a critic stage independently verifies the derivation and corrects errors. The same codebase placed first in the ICML 2025 SeePhys Challenge.
defaultPrompt: Use SciReasoner to solve this physics problem:
Use SciReasoner to caption this figure:
Use SciReasoner with k_samples=3 to solve:
